zh_summary: 鼓勵專案提出 WELL v2 尚未涵蓋的新介入策略，以新的方式支持 occupants 的 health and well-being。重點是創新不能只是一個想法，必須有既有 scientific, medical and/or industry research 支撐，並符合相關法規與建築設計、營運的 leading practices。
zh_specs: WELL Certification: 10 Pt | WELL Core: 10 Pt。
For All Spaces：提交符合要求的 innovation proposal。
提案需以 WELL v2 未涵蓋的 novel way 正向影響 project occupants，支持 health and well-being。
提案需由 existing scientific, medical and/or industry research substantiated。
提案需 consistent with applicable laws and regulations and leading practices in building design and operations。

zh_summary: 認可專案團隊納入 WELL Accredited Professional (WELL AP)，以支持 WELL application and certification process。WELL AP 代表對 WELL 與建築健康福祉的專業理解，可協助專案規劃、文件準備與認證推進更順暢。
zh_specs: WELL Certification: 1 Pt | WELL Core: 1 Pt。
For All Spaces：At least one member of the project team 需符合條件。
該 team member 需 has achieved the WELL Accredited Professional credential。
該 team member 需 maintains accreditation until project’s initial certification is achieved。

zh_summary: 透過 free, public tours 與教育內容，讓 occupants 與 visitors 理解 WELL features 如何影響健康與福祉。此 feature 聚焦把 WELL Certified space 作為實地學習場域，提升對建築健康策略的認知。
zh_specs: WELL Certification: 1 Pt | WELL Core: 1 Pt。
For All Spaces：提供 free, public tours of the WELL Certified space，可依 pre-determined schedule 或 upon request。
Tours offered at least six times per year。
Tours attended by at least 50 people per year。
Tours listed in the public directory of tours for WELL Certified spaces。
Tours include at least one destination per WELL concept，並透過 at least one publicly accessible channel 宣傳。

zh_summary: 認可專案已透過第三方健康與福祉 program 或 initiative，踏出更深入投入 health and well-being 的步驟。此 feature 強調組織可用不同路徑建立健康文化，但需完成可被辨識與認可的 wellness effort。
zh_specs: WELL Certification: 1 Pt | WELL Core: 1 Pt。
For All Spaces：需符合 Part 1 Complete Health and Wellness Programs。
Within the last three years，project has completed an independent health and wellness program。
或完成 an initiative approved by IWBI and listed on IWBI's website (Reference)。

zh_summary: 認可專案取得 leading green building rating systems 的 certification，並把 environmental sustainability 與 human health 放在同一個脈絡中。此 feature 強調降低建築環境影響也能在建築與社區尺度支持健康，讓 people and planet 同時受益。
zh_specs: WELL Certification: 5 Pt | WELL Core: 5 Pt。
For All Spaces：project is certified in a green building rating system approved by IWBI and listed on IWBI's website (Reference)。
Projects receive the full five points in Innovation for pursuing a green building rating system。
Projects cannot receive more than five points for pursuing additional green building rating programs。
